title: gh#63: R2.3 — Add planTransitionToPublishing + TransitionDecision
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/63.
Backlog section: Candidate 2 — Post Lifecycle aggregate.

## Context

Third PR in Candidate 2. The first worker-driven aggregate operation. Concentrates the inside-FOR-UPDATE decision logic of `publishPost` into a pure function. The worker's transaction shape, lock-release-before-network discipline, and budget-check callback wiring all stay where they are per ADR-0004 (5A).

## Scope

- Add to `packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts`:
  ```ts
  planTransitionToPublishing(
    currentRow: PostState,
    profile: { platform: Platform; ... },  // narrowed projection — not the full row
    preflight: PreflightState,
  ): TransitionDecision
  ```
  where:
  ```ts
  type TransitionDecision =
    | { kind: 'proceed'; patch: PostPatch }
    | { kind: 'recover'; recoveryPlatformPostId: string };
  ```
- Decision logic moves from `worker/post-lifecycle.service.ts` (the inside-tx block):
  - If `status === 'publishing'` AND `platformPostId` is set → return `{ kind: 'recover', recoveryPlatformPostId }` (issue #17 recovery path)
  - If `platformPostId` is already set (any other status path that allows it) → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'already_published' })`
  - If `status !== 'scheduled'` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'not_scheduled' })`
  - If `isThread` AND platform Twitter (Phase 4 scope) → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'thread_unsupported' })`
  - If `!preflight.mediaReady` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'media_pending' })`
  - If `!preflight.tokenHealthy` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'token_unhealthy' })`
  - If `preflight.budgetExhausted` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'budget_exhausted' })`
  - If `preflight.rateLimitExhausted` → throw `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'rate_limit_exhausted' })`
  - Otherwise return `{ kind: 'proceed', patch: { status: 'publishing', bumpVersion: true } }`
- Update `packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts`:
  - Map `LockedPostRow` (snake_case raw SQL projection) to `PostState` at the boundary
  - Map `socialProfiles.$inferSelect` to the narrow profile projection
  - Compute `PreflightState` from existing `checkBudget` / `checkTokenHealth` / media query callbacks
  - Call `planTransitionToPublishing(...)`, switch on the discriminant, write the patch in the transaction
  - Translate `PostInvariantError` to `PostLifecycleAbort` for the worker's existing graceful-abort handling (subset only: `already_published`, `not_scheduled`, `thread_unsupported`, `media_pending`, `token_unhealthy`, `budget_exhausted`, `rate_limit_exhausted`)
- Unit tests for `planTransitionToPublishing`: every decision branch + every error `kind`

## Out of scope

- `planRecordSuccess` / `planRecordFailure` (R2.4)
- Narrowing `PostLifecycleAbort` shape (R2.5 sweep)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` and test pass
- Existing `post-lifecycle.test.ts` cases pass without behavior change
- The 4 core invariants documented at the top of `post-lifecycle.service.ts` (idempotency, optimistic lock, runtime budget re-check, lock-release-before-network) are still enforced — verify each has a test

## References

- ADRs: [0003](../blob/main/docs/adr/0003-post-lifecycle-is-pure-functions-not-shared-repository.md), [0004](../blob/main/docs/adr/0004-publish-cycle-orchestration-stays-in-the-worker.md)
- Depends on: #61

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist. packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts currently exports only planDelete and planUpdate and has no planTransitionToPublishing implementation. packages/shared/src/post/types.ts has a TransitionDecision type at lines 40-43, but it is the unrelated {none|transition|blocked} shape, not the requested {proceed|recover} shape; PreflightState exists at lines 45-50 but rg shows no usage outside that type definition. The worker still contains the transition-to-publishing decision logic inline in packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts: platform_post_id recovery/idempotency at lines 284-307, not_scheduled/version checks at lines 309-323, thread_unsupported at lines 326-329, budget/rate-limit/media checks at lines 347-389, token_unhealthy at lines 414-428, and the publishing update at lines 431-439. It does not import or call a shared planner. packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts covers planDelete/planUpdate only and has no planTransitionToPublishing branch tests. A targeted Vitest run could not complete because the read-only sandbox prevented Vitest from writing packages/shared/node_modules/.vite-temp, but current code/test inspection is sufficient to show the requested refactor and tests are still missing.

The original evidence paths still exist. Current code now implements the requested shared planner: packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts defines planTransitionToPublishing with proceed/recover decisions and all requested PostInvariantError branches, and packages/shared/src/post/types.ts defines PostTransitionProfile, TransitionDecision, and PreflightState with the requested shape. packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts now has branch coverage for proceed, recover, already_published, not_scheduled, thread_unsupported, non-Twitter threads, and all preflight failure kinds. packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts now imports the planner, maps locked rows/profile projections, builds PreflightState from budget/media/token checks, uses the planner result for the publishing patch, preserves the recovery path, and maps PostInvariantError to PostLifecycleAbort. Worker tests still cover the core invariants around idempotency, optimistic locking, runtime budget aborts, and publish/prewrite ordering/recovery. `pnpm --filter @sms/shared exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `pnpm --filter @sms/worker exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. Targeted Vitest and normal build commands could not complete because the read-only sandbox prevented writes to `.vite-temp` and `dist`, not because of code/test failures.
commands: rg -n "Idempotency|Optimistic lock|Runtime budget re-check|Row lock is released|already_published|version_mismatch|budget_exhausted|outside the transaction|toHaveBeenCalledTimes\(1\)|not\.toHaveBeenCalled\(\)" packages/worker/src/__tests__ -g '*post-lifecycle*.test.ts'

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist. Current packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts defines planTransitionToPublishing with proceed/recover decisions and all requested PostInvariantError branches; packages/shared/src/post/types.ts defines PostTransitionProfile, TransitionDecision as proceed|recover, and PreflightState. The shared barrel exports these, and packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts covers proceed, recover, already_published, not_scheduled, thread_unsupported, non-Twitter thread allowance, and each preflight failure kind. Current packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts imports the planner/types, maps the locked row and profile projection, computes PreflightState from budget/media/token checks, calls planTransitionToPublishing for the transition, writes the returned publishing patch, preserves the issue #17 recovery path, and translates PostInvariantError to PostLifecycleAbort. Worker tests still cover idempotent already_published, version_mismatch optimistic locking, budget/media/token/rate-limit aborts before publish, lock-release/prewrite ordering, and recovery. Type-only verification passed for shared and worker with `tsc --noEmit`. Vitest and normal build commands could not complete because this session is read-only and Vite/tsc attempted to write `.vite-temp` or `dist`, not because of observed code failures.
